inputs.label: Mesiodistal Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the tooth measured from mesial to distal contact points, typically from dental X-ray or impression.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the tooth measured from mesial to distal contact points, typically from dental X-ray or impression.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişin meziyal ve distal temas noktaları arasında ölçülen genişlik, genellikle dental röntgen veya ölçüden.

inputs.label: Buccolingual Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the tooth measured from buccal (cheek) to lingual (tongue) surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the tooth measured from buccal (cheek) to lingual (tongue) surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişin bukkal (yanak) ve lingual (dil) yüzeyleri arasında ölçülen genişlik.

inputs.label: Crown Length
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the cementoenamel junction to the incisal edge or cusp tip.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from the cementoenamel junction to the incisal edge or cusp tip.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Semento-mine birleşiminden kesici kenar veya tüberkül tepesine olan mesafe.

inputs.label: Root Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the root from cementoenamel junction to apex, visible on radiograph.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the root from cementoenamel junction to apex, visible on radiograph.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Semento-mine birleşiminden apeks'e kadar olan kök uzunluğu, radyografide görünür.

inputs.label: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Count of permanent teeth fully emerged through gingiva and in functional occlusion.

label_i18n.en: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
label_i18n.de: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
label_i18n.fr: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
label_i18n.es: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth
label_i18n.ar: Number of Fully Erupted Permanent Teeth

businessContext_i18n.en: Count of permanent teeth fully emerged through gingiva and in functional occlusion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diş etinden tamamen çıkmış ve fonksiyonel oklüzyonda olan daimi diş sayısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
